loop_condition: Drain inbox + vault/intake/queue.jsonl. For each candidate: intake -> cross-reference -> verdict -> .md -> DB row -> peer-notify. Soft re-review on re-intake. Re-poll utterances each iter.
shipped_this_iter: CLAUDE.md rewritten from placeholder to full charter (mission, scope, tech stack, project structure, milestones, verdict heuristic table, peer-notification doctrine, loop condition)
Intake adapters: intake/github.py (clone + gh metadata + UTF-8 encoding fix), intake/ig.py (stub-aware), intake/local.py (local path for desktop drops)

review/cross_reference.py: token overlap with stopwords, per-token cap, per-file distinct-token min/max, top-5 source-weighted hits (tools=2.0x, project CLAUDE=1.4x, inventions=1.0x, brain=0.3x), sqrt-damped /25

review/notify_peers.py: 17 fleet lanes routed (vault/memory/overseer/term/panel/snap{,-quantum}/tiktok/emulator-bundle [debuggers + RE tools] / kernel-apk / quantum / compliance / os / forge / claw / letstext)
review/decide.py: orchestrator with verdict heuristic + manual override + soft re-review path (no re-clone, appends addendum on material change, notifies only new peers)
jokester_cli.py top-level CLI: intake / recall / list / stats / reindex / drain-queue
projects.json v15 entry updated with real tag + session_start + focus
